title: Chat Emoji Mod
description: This mod lets you post twemoji in chat. Type :tada: and it transform client side to 🎉 for everyone with the mod!
body:
This mod lets you post twemoji in chat. Type :tada: and it transform client side to 🎉 for everyone with the mod!

This mod is mainly made for severs like Hypixel that dont let you send the unicode representation of emojis in chat

This does not work in single player / servers that use CHAT instead of GAME

![stupid emojis in chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a904cdf38fbba99408e67bad6139406bc5000e3.png)

Credit for all the art goes to: https://github.com/AmberWat/PixelTwemojiMC-18
